title: stemmadenia litoralis
intro: Stemmadenia litoralis, also known as the sea gape or beach morning glory, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stemmadenia litoralis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit potential antiviral and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, Stemmadenia litoralis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, respiratory issues, and skin problems.
